name: API Docs from OpenAPI
description: Reads an OpenAPI/Swagger specification (or infers endpoints from route code) and generates human-readable Markdown API documentation with endpoints, parameters, schemas, and example requests and responses.
author: ClaudeStudio Docs Pack

inputs.label: OpenAPI spec file (optional)
inputs.help: Path to openapi.yaml/json. If empty, endpoints are inferred from route code under the source directory.

inputs.label: Source directory (fallback)
inputs.help: Used to infer routes when no spec is provided.

steps.title: Load API surface
steps.prompt: If {{spec_path}} is provided, parse the OpenAPI/Swagger document. Otherwise scan {{source_dir}} for route definitions (controllers, decorators, router registrations) and reconstruct the endpoint list. For each endpoint capture: method, path, summary, parameters (path/query/header), request body schema, response schemas per status code, and auth requirements.

steps.title: Write API docs
steps.prompt: Generate Markdown API documentation using {{base_url}} in examples. Structure: an overview, an authentication section, then one section per resource grouping endpoints. For each endpoint document the method+path, description, parameters table, request body schema, and response table. If include_examples = {{include_examples}}, add a realistic curl request and a JSON response example per endpoint. Add a 'Schemas' appendix for shared models. Only document what the spec/code supports; flag gaps with TODO.
